RemediationStrings.Title: DeviceEnumerationPolicy (Device Security)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\Kernel DMA Protection\DeviceEnumerationPolicy must be 0. Severity: Critical. Category: Device Security.

RemediationStrings.Title: DenyDeviceClasses (Device Security)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\DeviceInstall\Restrictions\DenyDeviceClasses must be 1. Severity: Medium. Category: Device Security.

RemediationStrings.Title: DenyDeviceClassesRetroactive (Device Security)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\DeviceInstall\Restrictions\DenyDeviceClassesRetroactive must be 1. Severity: Medium. Category: Device Security.

RemediationStrings.Title: **delvals. (Device Security)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\DeviceInstall\Restrictions\DenyDeviceClasses\**delvals. must be . Severity: Medium. Category: Device Security.

RemediationStrings.Title: 1 (Device Security)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\DeviceInstall\Restrictions\DenyDeviceClasses\1 must be {d48179be-ec20-11d1-b6b8-00c04fa372a7}. Severity: Medium. Category: Device Security.
